prompt: A {argument name="photography style" default="hyper-realistic macro photograph"} of a vibrant {argument name="animal" default="chameleon"} resting on a {argument name="setting" default="mossy branch in a lush jungle"}. The reptile features intricate, textured scales in shades of {argument name="primary colors" default="bright green, electric blue, and warm yellow"}, with a prominent, highly detailed eye. Its clawed feet tightly grip the wet, textured wood, and its tail is curled beneath. The background is a smooth, out-of-focus bokeh of deep green foliage, highlighting the sharp focus and vivid colors of the subject.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="photography style" default="超写实微距摄影作品"}，主体为一只 {argument name="primary color" default="鲜艳的绿色和蓝色"} 变色龙，栖息在 {argument name="background environment" default="茂密丛林"} 中潮湿且长满苔藓的树枝上。变色龙拥有错综复杂的凸起鳞片，点缀着黄色和红色，并配有一只细节极其丰富的硕大眼睛。它锋利的爪子紧紧抓着深色且纹理分明的木头，尾巴紧紧卷成螺旋状垂在树枝下方。背景是柔和的深绿色虚化叶片，突出了爬行动物身上极度清晰的 8k 分辨率细节。柔和的自然光衬托出潮湿的质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超写实变色龙微距摄影：生成一张细节丰富、照片级的变色龙栖息于树枝上的图像，支持自定义颜色和背景。
breakdown.subject: 综合主体
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
